name: graflo
summary: Manifest-driven Graph Schema & Transformation Language (GSTL): define labeled property graph schemas, ingest from CSV/JSON/Parquet/SQL/RDF/SPARQL/API sources, infer schemas from PostgreSQL 3NF or OWL/RDFS ontologies, apply schema migrations, and project to ArangoDB, Neo4j, TigerGraph, FalkorDB, Memgraph, or NebulaGraph.
